response.justification: Bogdan has solid software engineering credentials and architectural experience, but fails to meet critical minimum qualifications for this systems-focused role. He has only ~6 months of documented C++ experience against an 8-year requirement, and his background is primarily in full-stack web development, data platforms, and infrastructure automation rather than low-level systems programming and cloud compute platforms. The C++ gap alone is disqualifying for a role requiring substantial systems work.
strengths: Proven ability to architect and mentor on complex technical systems, including high-performance infrastructure handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Strong engineering practices foundation with TDD, CI/CD, and infrastructure automation (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) across multiple roles
Demonstrated leadership scaling from individual contributor to Staff level with experience teaching workshops and establishing best practices
concerns: Critical disqualifier: only 6 months of documented C++ experience vs. 8-year minimum requirement for this systems-focused cloud platform role
Limited evidence of building or operating large-scale distributed cloud compute platforms; background is primarily web, data, and infrastructure automation
No demonstrated production experience with cloud architecture or compute infrastructure systems at the depth required for mid-senior technical leadership
